# SRC049 - Building Effective Agents

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | Agent Harness |
| Authors / source | Anthropic |
| Year | 2024 |
| Source type | Official engineering guidance |
| Quality | High |
| URL | [https://www.anthropic.com/research/building-effective-agents](https://www.anthropic.com/research/building-effective-agents) |

## Bias / limitation

Vendor guidance; strong practical patterns.

## Core takeaway

Successful agents often use simple composable patterns; use workflows when predictable and agents when runtime adaptation matters.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use to prevent overcomplicated multi-agent theater.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.

## Research extraction template

```markdown
### Source extraction

- Source ID: SRC049
- What it changes about our strategy:
- What it proves:

- Ad tactic suggested:
- Landing page proof suggested:
- Measurement implication:
- Follow-up source needed:
```
